---
marimo-static-output: true
---

# DateParts { #json2vec.DateParts }

```python
DateParts()
```

Date/time tensorfield request that extracts configured calendar parts.

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [type](#json2vec.DateParts.type) |  |
| [dateparts](#json2vec.DateParts.dateparts) |  |
| [pattern](#json2vec.DateParts.pattern) |  |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [check_dateparts](#json2vec.DateParts.check_dateparts) |  |
| [check_date_pattern](#json2vec.DateParts.check_date_pattern) |  |

### check_dateparts { #json2vec.DateParts.check_dateparts }

```python
check_dateparts(v)
```



### check_date_pattern { #json2vec.DateParts.check_date_pattern }

```python
check_date_pattern(v)
```
